            Name = n.Name,

        var __result = new global::System.Collections.Generic.List<global::Demo.NodeDto>();
        if (entry is null) return __result;
        var __visited = new global::System.Collections.Generic.HashSet<object>(global::System.Collections.Generic.ReferenceEqualityComparer.Instance);

        __queue.Enqueue(entry);

            var __n = __queue.Dequeue();
